title: Reward
description: A digital gift card or prepaid reward issued through the Giftbit platform.

uuid.description: Giftbit-generated unique identifier for the reward.

campaign_uuid.description: Giftbit-generated unique identifier for the parent order.

campaign_id.description: Client-supplied identifier for the parent order.

delivery_status.description: Email delivery status of the reward.

status.description: Redemption status of the reward offer.

management_dashboard_link.description: URL for viewing this reward in the Giftbit account dashboard.

redelivery_count.description: Number of times the reward was resent to the recipient.

price_in_cents.description: Value of the reward in cents.

brand_code.description: Unique brand identifier. May be absent if recipient has not yet chosen from a multi-brand order.

recipient_email.description: Email address of the reward recipient.

created_date.description: Date and time reward was created in Pacific Standard Time. Format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.

delivery_date.description: Date and time reward was delivered. Format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.
